reviews.review_title: Time flies when you are having fun
reviews.review_description:
I love all kinds of puzzles games. This one is Tetris with a twist.
Think where to put your bombs, to help you out.
Further in game, the blocks don’t come faster, so you can enjoy the game on your own pace.

reviews.review_title: 🟦 Brilliant VR Twist on Classic Tetris!
reviews.review_description:
As a big Tetris fan, I’m genuinely impressed by how well VRTIS reinvents the classic formula. Being able to slide pieces underneath incomplete lines is a clever and refreshing twist that opens up entirely new strategies. Add VR into the mix and suddenly you’re seeing the board from angles you never thought possible.

The new piece types add even more novelty, and what was supposed to be a quick 20-minute test turned into a 2-hour session without even noticing. It’s polished, addictive, and an absolute treat for puzzle lovers.

Huge thanks to the studio for delivering such a fun and inventive experience!
